Emergent Facial Configurations

Author

Jeffrey Girard

Published

June 12, 2026

Setup

library(tidyverse)
library(furrr)
library(gt)
library(facs) #remotes::install_github("jmgirard/facs")
library(datawizard)
library(flexmix)

info <- 
  left_join(
    read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/session_info.rds"), 
    read_rds("facs_times.rds"), 
    by = c("subject", "wave")
  ) |> 
  filter(
    !(subject == 18 & wave == 6),
    wave %in% c(6, 9)
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    valid_session = session_duration - vis - hat,
    valid_fullface = ffa - vis - hat
  )
facs <- 
  read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/facs_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info) |>
  filter(
    !(subject == 18 & wave == 6),
    wave %in% c(6, 9)
  )

project_scheme <- scheme(
  list(
    occurrence = c(1:2, 4:39),
    intensity = c(1:2, 4:39),
    asymmetry = c(1:2, 4:39)
  )
)

protos <- 
  prototypes |> 
  filter(is.na(emotion_type) | emotion_type != "compound") |> 
  mutate(
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("anger", "angry"), "anger", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("confused", "confusion"), "confusion", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("desire", "desire food", "desire sex"), "desire", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("disgust", "disgusted"), "disgust", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("fear", "fearful"), "fear", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("happy", "happiness", "joy"), "happiness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("sad", "sadness"), "sadness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("surprise", "surprised"), "surprise", emotion)
  )

Preprocessing for Mixture Modeling

plan("multisession", workers = 9)

bin_events <- function(df, bin_size) {
  # Determine the range of bins
  start_time <- min(df$session_onset)
  end_time <- max(df$session_offset)
  bins <- seq(start_time, end_time, by = bin_size)
  
  # Initialize output data frame
  output <- data.frame(
    bin_onset = bins[-length(bins)],
    bin_offset = bins[-1]
  )
  
  # Add columns for each possible number
  for (num in project_scheme$occurrence) {
    output[[paste0("AU", num)]] <- 0
  }
  
  # Iterate through each bin and mark numbers present in overlapping events
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(output))) {
    bin_start <- output$bin_onset[i]
    bin_end <- output$bin_offset[i]
    
    # Identify events overlapping this bin
    overlapping_events <- df[df$facs_onset < bin_end & df$facs_offset > bin_start, ]
    
    # Mark numbers for this bin
    for (event_label in overlapping_events$facs_code) {
      numbers_in_event <- pull_numcodes(event_label)
      output[i, paste0("AU", numbers_in_event)] <- 1
    }
  }
  
  return(output)
}
facs_bin <- 
  facs |> 
  nest(.by = c(subject, wave, month)) |> 
  mutate(
    binned = future_map(
      data, 
      \(x) x |> 
        bin_events(bin_size = 1/10) |> 
        filter(rowSums(pick(starts_with("AU"))) > 0)
    )
  )
facs_bin_long <- 
  facs_bin |> 
  select(-data) |> 
  unnest(binned)

facs_bin_prev <- 
  facs_bin_long |> 
  summarize(across(starts_with("AU"), mean)) |> 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "AU", values_to = "Occurrence")

facs_bin_prev |> 
  drop_na(Occurrence) |> 
  arrange(desc(Occurrence)) |> 
  gt() |>
  fmt_percent(columns = "Occurrence")

facs_inc <- 
  facs_bin_prev |> 
  filter(Occurrence >= 0.01, AU != "AU50") |> 
  pull(AU) |> 
  print()
 [1] "AU1"  "AU2"  "AU4"  "AU5"  "AU6"  "AU7"  "AU10" "AU12" "AU17" "AU18"
[11] "AU20" "AU25" "AU26"

Mixture Modeling

outfile <- "sfm_1-10_r100.rds"
if (file.exists(outfile)) {
  sres <- read_rds(outfile)
} else {
  sres <- 
    stepFlexmix(
      formula = as.formula(paste("cbind(", paste(facs_inc, collapse = ", "), ") ~ 1")),
      data = facs_bin_long |> select(starts_with("AU")),
      model = FLXMCmvbinary(),
      k = 1:10,
      nrep = 100,
      unique = TRUE
    )
  write_rds(sres, "sfm_1-10_r100.rds", compress = "gz")
}

ures <- unique(sres)

ures_perf <- 
  tibble(
    k = ures@k,
    AIC = map_dbl(ures@models, AIC),
    BIC = map_dbl(ures@models, BIC),
    ICL = map_dbl(ures@models, ICL)
  )
gt(ures_perf)
k AIC BIC ICL
1 144339.9 144442.5 144442.5
2 121353.4 121566.5 121977.6
3 112555.9 112879.5 113745.4
4 111784.9 112219.0 115028.7
5 111472.4 112016.9 117748.1
6 111010.9 111666.0 116682.2 
ures_perf |> 
  pivot_longer(-k, names_to = "stat", values_to = "value") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = k, y = value, color = stat, shape = stat)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 3/4) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of Mixture Components",
    y = "Performance (lower is better)",
    color = "Metric",
    shape = "Metric"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

Three-Cluster Model (Favored by ICL)

fit <- ures@models[[3]]
parameters(fit) |> 
  as_tibble(rownames = "AU") |> 
  pivot_longer(-AU, names_to = "Cluster", values_to = "Prob") |> 
  mutate(
    AU = str_remove(AU, "center."),
    Cluster = str_remove(Cluster, "Comp."),
    across(AU:Cluster, \(x) factor(parse_number(x))),
    AU = fct_rev(AU),
    ClusterAlpha = factor(
      Cluster, 
      labels = paste0(LETTERS[1:fit@k], " (", round(fit@size / sum(fit@size) * 100, 1), "%)")
    ),
    Prob_label = sprintf("%.2f", Prob),
    Prob_color = ifelse(Prob > .8, "white", "black")
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(
    x = ClusterAlpha, 
    y = AU, 
    fill = Prob, 
    label = Prob_label
  )) +
  geom_tile(color = "grey") +
  geom_text(aes(color = Prob_color)) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top", expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "white", 
    high = "#3182bd", 
    limits = c(0, 1)
  ) + 
  guides(fill = guide_colorbar(
    frame.colour = "black", 
    ticks.colour = "black"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Mixture Component (and Prevalence)", 
    y = "Facial Action Unit (AU)", 
    fill = "Probability"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
ggsave("three-cluster.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)

Observed Configurations

plan("multisession", workers = 9)
occ_counts <- 
  facs |> 
  select(-month) |> 
  mutate(
    occ = future_map_chr(facs_code, function(x) {
      codes <- tidy(coding(x))[[1]]$occurrence
      paste(codes[codes %in% project_scheme$occurrence], collapse = "+")
    }),
    occ = na_if(occ, ""),
    occ = na_if(occ, "NA"),
    occ = coding(occ)
  )
obs_table <- 
  occ_counts |> 
  summarize(
    .by = occ,
    n_subjects = n_distinct(subject),
    n_events = n(),
    duration = sum(facs_duration),
    session_pct = duration / sum(info$valid_session),
    fullface_pct = duration / sum(info$valid_fullface)
  ) |> 
  mutate(n_aus = str_count(occ, "\\+") + 1, .after = occ) |> 
  arrange(desc(duration)) |> 
  drop_na(occ) |>
  #filter(fullface_pct >= 0.001) |> 
  #mutate(fullface_pct = scales::percent(fullface_pct, accuracy = 0.01)) |> 
  mutate(
    proto = compare_to_prototypes(
      occ, 
      scheme = project_scheme, 
      proto = protos,
      uncoded = "omit", 
      output = "exact"
    ),
    proto = map_chr(proto, \(x) str_c(names(x), collapse = "\n")),
    cluster = map_chr(occ, \(x) {
      aus <- paste0("AU", tidy(x)[[1]]$occurrence)
      mat <- matrix(0, nrow = 1, ncol = length(facs_inc), dimnames = list(1, facs_inc))
      if (!all(aus %in% facs_inc)) { return(NA_character_) }
      mat[1, aus] <- 1
      cluster <- which.max(posterior(fit, newdata = as.data.frame(mat)))
      LETTERS[cluster]
    })
  )

describe_distribution(obs_table, select = c("n_aus", "n_subjects", "n_events", "duration", "session_pct", "fullface_pct"))
Variable     |     Mean |       SD |      IQR |                Range | Skewness

fullface_pct |   315.93 | 891 |         0
write_csv(obs_table, "obs_table.csv")
obs_table |> 
  filter(fullface_pct >= 0.01) |> 
  gt() |> 
  fmt_number(
    columns = "duration",
    decimals = 1
  ) |> 
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c("session_pct", "fullface_pct")
  ) |> 
  tab_options(
    container.height = px(500),
    container.overflow.y = TRUE
  )
